title: Microsoft announces Xbox backward compatibility on PC, starting with four classics
summary: The company allows playing original Xbox titles like Conker: Live & Reloaded and Blinx on PC and handheld devices for the first time.

title: Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game delays its Xbox launch to September and will not have crossplay on Switch
summary: The anticipated fighting game is delayed on Xbox Series just hours before its launch, while the Switch version will lack crossplay functionality at launch.

title: Valve renews Steam, making it easier to gift games and adding wishlist categories
summary: Steam introduces new organization and gifting features, allowing users to better manage their wishlist and simplify gifts between friends.

title: Layoffs at Bethesda on the same day as new Fallout announcement, union calls severance 'minimum legal'
summary: Bethesda Montreal workers were laid off with the minimum possible severance coinciding with Microsoft's announcements about the future of Fallout.

title: Splatoon Raiders arrives on Switch 2 with a launch update and its creators reveal its origins
summary: The action spin-off is now available accompanied by a patch, while the developers confess that the game was born as a base defense project.

title: Miyamoto defends remakes, confirms new Star Fox and Yoshi games, and steps away from directing
summary: In multiple interviews, the creator of Mario explains the value of remakes like Ocarina of Time, reveals that the Super Mario Galaxy movie spurred new installments, and that he does not plan to direct another game.

title: GSC Game World denies that Stalker 2's Xbox exclusivity cost more than development
summary: The studio strongly denies statements from the original founder and assures that the agreement with Microsoft did not exceed the game's development budget.

title: Halo: Combat Evolved Remake launches early access on Xbox, PS5, and PC
summary: The long-awaited Halo remaster is now available in early access on all platforms, allowing crossplay between consoles and PC.

title: Hasbro unveils the first official The Legend of Zelda figures for 2027
summary: The toy company showcases its new line of collectible figures based on the Nintendo saga, generating a great reception among fans.

title: Xbox Series sales double in June in the US while the total console market plummets
summary: Despite Xbox's growth, hardware sales in the United States fall 62% year-over-year, making Microsoft's console the only one in positive territory.

title: LEGO and Nintendo officially unveil the Donkey Kong arcade set for August 2026
summary: The construction set of the classic Donkey Kong arcade game is revealed with official photos and a price for LEGO collectors.

title: Trailer for Zach Cregger's new Resident Evil movie includes multiple references to the games
summary: The film's trailer shows numerous Easter eggs and direct connections to the video game saga, raising fans' expectations.

title: Amazon Luna integrates into Prime Video and Prime Gaming adds free games for subscribers
summary: Amazon's cloud gaming service arrives on the streaming platform, while Prime subscribers gain access to a new selection of titles at no additional cost.

title: Hasbro suffers $56 million losses and cancels several video games, but keeps Warlock and Exodus
summary: The company cuts its ambitions in the sector after the Baldur's Gate 3 boom, although it confirms that the anticipated Exodus and Warlock are moving forward.

title: Blizzard investigates a World of Warcraft Game Master for cheating for their friends
summary: A scandal rocks the community when it is discovered that a support team member was remotely killing bosses to favor their acquaintances, triggering an internal investigation.

title: Developers and analysts criticize the potential removal of physical discs on PlayStation
summary: The creator of Disgaea suggests that Sony should stop manufacturing consoles if it removes discs, while an analyst warns that this 'condemns' physical stores.

title: Reports indicate a drop of up to 82% in Steam Deck sales following price increases
summary: New reports indicate that Valve's popular handheld console has suffered a collapse in sales, raising concerns about its future in the market.

title: FromSoftware opens registration for the online beta of The Duskbloods on Switch 2
summary: Interested parties can now register to participate in the network test of the anticipated action title exclusive to Nintendo's console.

title: Professional player Faker named honorary police officer in South Korea to fight gambling addiction
summary: The League of Legends star will collaborate with authorities in an awareness campaign about the dangers of online gaming among South Korean youth.

title: Star Wars Zero Company will be a linear game without New Game+ or mod support, according to Bit Reactor
summary: The studio confirms that the action title will have a duration of 30 to 40 hours with a strong focus on clone customization, but without branching paths or official modding.
